title: Cookie policy
seoDescription: Cookie policy of Instal Berrozpe and operation of the website's multilingual consent system.
intro: This website uses only the cookies required for its operation and a consent system for optional categories, which are currently inactive by default.

sections.heading: Necessary cookies
body: Necessary cookies enable basic technical functions, such as remembering consent preferences and keeping the website working properly.
These cookies may remain active without prior consent because they are required to provide the service requested by the user.

sections.heading: Optional categories and consent
body: The website is prepared for optional categories such as preferences, analytics or marketing, but none of them are enabled by default or loaded before the relevant consent is given.
If optional tools are added in the future, they will only run after explicit acceptance of the corresponding category.

sections.heading: Managing preferences
body: Users can accept, reject or configure cookies from the initial banner.
Preferences can be reopened at any time from the permanent link in the footer.

sections.heading: Google Maps and third parties
body: The website does not load a live Google Maps iframe by default.
Location blocks work through text-based address information and an external link, avoiding unnecessary third-party loading before consent.
